metadata.title: Billing | Slashie
metadata.description: Manage Slashie worker membership billing, quote access, checkout, and plan status.

en.title: Billing & membership
en.description: Manage your Slashie Unlimited subscription and monthly quote allowance.
en.descriptionNonWorker: Manage your Slashie Unlimited subscription and quote allowance.

nonWorker.title: Become a worker to manage billing
nonWorker.description: Slashie Unlimited is for workers who send quotes on tasks.
nonWorker.body: Set up your worker profile first, then return here to start a free trial or manage your subscription.

meter.label: Quotes this month (UTC)
meter.reset: Resets at the start of each UTC calendar month.
meter.aria: {used} of {total} free quotes used this month

en.aboutBody: Job payments are arranged directly with customers. This subscription is for platform access only — Slashie does not process task payments.
en.checkoutActivatingBody: This usually takes a few seconds after checkout.
en.checkoutCancelledTitle: Checkout cancelled — you can try again anytime.
en.billingErrorTitle: Could not load billing details. Refresh the page or try again shortly.
en.usageDescription: {count} quotes per UTC month on the free plan.
en.usageExhausted: You've used all free quotes this month. Upgrade for unlimited quoting.
en.paymentPastDue: Payment issue — update your payment method to keep unlimited quotes.
en.paymentUnpaid: Payment required — update billing to restore unlimited quotes.
en.featureBrowse: Browse tasks without a monthly quote cap

metadata.title: 帳單 | Slashie
metadata.description: 管理 Slashie 工作者會員帳單、報價權限、結帳和方案狀態。

zh_hk.title: 帳單與會員
zh_hk.description: 管理你的 Slashie Unlimited 訂閱和每月報價額度。
zh_hk.descriptionNonWorker: 管理你的 Slashie Unlimited 訂閱和報價額度。

nonWorker.title: 成為工作者以管理帳單
nonWorker.description: Slashie Unlimited 供傳送任務報價的工作者使用。
nonWorker.body: 請先設定工作者個人檔案，然後返回此處開始免費試用或管理訂閱。

meter.label: 本月報價（UTC）
meter.reset: 於每個 UTC 曆月開始時重設。
meter.aria: 本月已使用 {used} / {total} 個免費報價

zh_hk.aboutBody: 工作款項由你與顧客直接安排。此訂閱只用於平台使用權 — Slashie 不會處理任務付款。
zh_hk.checkoutCancelledTitle: 已取消結帳 — 你可以隨時再試。
zh_hk.billingErrorTitle: 未能載入帳單詳情。請重新整理頁面或稍後再試。
zh_hk.usageDescription: 免費方案每月（UTC）可傳送 {count} 個報價。
zh_hk.usageExhausted: 你已用完本月免費報價。升級即可無限報價。
zh_hk.paymentPastDue: 付款出現問題 — 請更新付款方式以繼續無限報價。
zh_hk.paymentUnpaid: 需要付款 — 請更新帳單以恢復無限報價。
zh_hk.featureBrowse: 瀏覽任務不受每月報價上限限制
zh_hk.startTrial: 開始 6 個月免費試用
